other_observers: Joey Kellner (Photo), Glenn Walbek, Norm Erthal MOB; Yes
specific_location: Private ranch at CCR 9 and CCR CC
description: This Tyrannus type flycatcher was grayish white over-all with dark wings and tail and pink underwings, flanks and belly. The bill, legs and eyes were black. The tertials, greater and secondary scapular feathers were edged in white.The black and white tail was about 1 to 1.25 times the body length.Behaviors: This bird was found flycatching in a cottonwood tree in the middle of a farm hedge row.Call: none heardPlumage: Adult probable male
photographer: Photographer: Ric Olson Photo by Joey Kellner
